dungeon: FACECAM multi-dungeon stream (creator 'Stregzter'; webcam covers the bottom-left chat + a 'SUBSCRIBE' overlay) — a long ~700s run through 14 dungeon entries across many biomes, plus the PET YARD UI shown. The webcam obscures the chat, so only fragmentary boss text is visible (a 'Court of Oryx' run + a '...WARDEN' boss + a 'my minions!' summoner + an 'I have failed...' line) — too fragmentary to attribute cleanly. Main concrete capture = the PET system (Pet Yard / Feed / Fuse). Server identity (ROTF vs other RotMG) NOT positively confirmed.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+minimaps: a 14-entry multi-dungeon hop across biomes — a GREEN grass REALM (structures + realm minimap), dark SPACE/VOID zones (scattered-enemy open maps; recurring galactic-zone style), a BLUE WATER/ICE area, white SNOW, and white VAULT/item-grid rooms. Hub<->dungeon hopping; no single dungeon layout (catalogued biomes). No bossends -> arenas not geometry-traced.
